NAME

export.h - GPG public key export interface.

SYNOPSIS

Functions

GPG Key Export



int gpg_get_public_key (const char *key_id, uint8_t *public_key_out, char *keygrip_out)
Get public key from GPG keyring by key ID.

GPG public key export interface.
